titleEn: Poultry WorldJun 12VideoPoultry Talks: Maximising automation in the poultry industry
titleZh: 家禽行业自动化最大化：WingScan羽毛性别分选技术案例
summaryZh: 本文报道了Poultry Talks节目关于家禽行业自动化最大化的讨论，重点介绍了Targan公司开发的WingScan自动羽毛性别分选机在全球孵化场的应用。文章强调自动化在农场、加工厂和孵化场中的优势，包括更高产出、更高精度和更高效流程，并探讨了如何通过安装、培训、优化、故障排除和长期性能跟踪来最大化自动化效益，防止停机。
featuredReason: 本文通过具体案例（WingScan自动羽毛性别分选机）展示了自动化在家禽孵化场的实际应用和效益，为智慧畜牧行业人士提供了如何最大化自动化价值、减少停机时间的实践参考。
contentFull: Poultry Talks: Maximising automation in the poultry industryThe poultry industry is increasingly reliant on automation on farms, in processing facilities and in hatcheries. The benefits are clear: higher output, greater accuracy and more efficient processes. A good example is the WingScan automated feather-sexing machine developed by Targan, which has been installed in hatcheries around the world. Fabian BrockötterEditor in Chief, Poultry WorldJun 12VideoIn this episode of Poultry Talks, we examine the conditions needed to get the most out of automation, as downtime must be prevented at all costs. Editorial director at Misset, Fabian Brockötter, is joined by Targan customer success managers Jason Fryar and Ricardo Martin to discuss how their teams turn advanced technology into day-to-day results — from installation and training to optimisation, troubleshooting and long-term performance tracking.Watch the previous episode of Poultry Talks, which focussed on soy, exploring its role as a feed ingredient and examining the Soy Moratorium, what it is and what it means for Brazil.
translationZh:
家禽行业在农场、加工厂和孵化场中越来越依赖自动化。其好处显而易见：更高的产出、更高的精度以及更高效的流程。一个很好的例子是Targan公司开发的WingScan自动羽毛性别分选机，该设备已安装在全球各地的孵化场中。

在本期Poultry Talks节目中，我们探讨了充分发挥自动化效益所需的条件，因为必须不惜一切代价防止停机。Misset的编辑总监Fabian Brockötter与Targan的客户成功经理Jason Fryar和Ricardo Martin一起，讨论了他们的团队如何将先进技术转化为日常成果——从安装和培训到优化、故障排除和长期性能跟踪。

观看上一期Poultry Talks节目，该节目聚焦大豆，探讨其作为饲料原料的作用，并审视大豆禁令及其对巴西的意义。
author: Fabian Brockötter
